TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == bzyok == qmayat bzyok hopa ga niqun ta la. mnoyas balay qu bzyok qnhyun hiya. mutu wahan maniq na bzyok qnhyun qu bway na bgayaw. mha ni sqliqun ta 'laqi kneril lga, mutu ta msina pira bzyok galan ta sapat. .
S.PHON: == βzjok == qmajat βzjok ħopa ɣa niqun ta la. mnojas~ɕ βalaj qu βzjok qnħjun ħija. mutu waħan maniq na βzjok qnħjun qu βwaj na βɣajaw. mħa ni s~ɕqliqun ta ʔlaqi kneril lɣa, mutu ta ms~ɕina pira βzjok ɣalan ta s~ɕapat. .
S.FORM: == bzyok == qmayat bzyok hopa ga niqun ta la. mnoyas balay qu bzyok qnhyun hiya. mutu wahan maniq na bzyok qnhyun qu bway na bgayaw. mha ni sqliqun ta 'laqi kneril lga, mutu ta msina pira bzyok galan ta sapat. .
S.PHON: == βzjok == qmajat βzjok ħopa ɣa niqun ta la. mnojas~ɕ βalaj qu βzjok qnħjun ħija. mutu waħan maniq na βzjok qnħjun qu βwaj na βɣajaw. mħa ni s~ɕqliqun ta ʔlaqi kneril lɣa, mutu ta ms~ɕina pira βzjok ɣalan ta s~ɕapat. .
